npc: Hey. You are in the sewer. That was not a metaphor until you made it one.
Find the Rust Key, slap monsters, and try not to lick anything glowing.
The boss is past the door. He calls himself royalty. His throne is a toilet.
battleStart: The smell alone should count as an attack.
Combat started. HR has been notified.
chest: You opened a chest. Brave, greedy, same thing.
